Set the map zoom level

Source: R/views.R
set_zoom.Rd

Set the map zoom level

Usage

set_zoom(map, zoom)

Arguments

map

The map or map proxy object.

zoom

The zoom level to set. Default is 2.

Value

The map or map proxy object for chaining.

Examples

 map() |>
  set_zoom(5)
